query:
SELECT ad_id, creative_id, media_type, image_url, video_id, destination_url FROM ad_source_details LIMIT 3;
SELECT ad_id, adset_name, content_fingerprint, impressions, reach, frequency, ctr, spend FROM ad_performance LIMIT 3;

SELECT ad_id, adset_name, content_fingerprint, impressions, reach, frequency, ctr, spend FROM ad_performance LIMIT 3;
